summary: JG12 Iteration 19 - ClientDetailPage 8 Tabs fully verified. Backend: 16/16 tests pass (GET /api/admin/clients/{id} with macro_history + nutrition_stats, PUT macros with history tracking). Frontend: All 8 tabs verified with correct content and orange #FF671F active tab styling.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/clients/{id} returns macro_history array
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/clients/{id} returns nutrition_stats object
✅ Backend: nutrition_stats has total_diets, recent_diets, top_foods fields
✅ Backend: clientedemo has 6 diets with 5 top foods
✅ Backend: Profile has macros_training (P=190, H=170, G=60), macros_periworkout (P=45, H=50), macros_rest (P=225, H=170, G=60)
✅ Backend: PUT /api/admin/clients/{id}/macros creates history entry with changed_by, client_weight, note
✅ Backend: PUT /api/admin/clients/{id}/macros stores previous macros in history
✅ Backend: Auth protection works (401/403 for no auth, 403 for client token)
✅ Frontend: ClientDetailPage has 8 tabs (resumen, macros, membresia, reportes, cuestionario, entrenamiento, nutricion, seguimiento)
✅ Frontend: Tab Resumen shows 12 info items (nombre, email, telefono, plan, estado, semana, entrenador, rutina, cobro, inicio, peso, objetivo)
✅ Frontend: Tab Macros shows 3 groups (Entrenamiento P=190 H=170 G=60, Perientreno P=45 H=50, Descanso P=225 H=170 G=60)
✅ Frontend: Tab Macros 'Cambiar macros' button opens modal with 6 inputs and mandatory note
✅ Frontend: Tab Macros modal rejects save without note (shows 'El motivo es obligatorio' error toast)
✅ Frontend: Tab Macros shows macro history with changed_by and note
✅ Frontend: Tab Membresía shows plan, precio, inicio, próximo cobro, historial pagos
✅ Frontend: Tab Reportes shows 'Sin reportes aún' (clientedemo has 0 reports)
✅ Frontend: Tab Cuestionario shows goal (volumen), weight (80kg), sex (hombre)
✅ Frontend: Tab Entrenamiento shows equipment, injuries, current routine with 7 days
✅ Frontend: Tab Nutrición shows top 5 alimentos and 6 recent diets
✅ Frontend: Tab Seguimiento shows 'Se completará con los check-ins del cliente'
✅ Frontend: Active tab has orange #FF671F background
critical_code_review_comments: admin.py: GET /clients/{id} correctly aggregates macro_history and nutrition_stats from MongoDB
admin.py: PUT /clients/{id}/macros correctly stores previous_training, previous_rest, changed_by, client_weight in macro_history
admin.py: nutrition_stats correctly calculates top_foods from diet comidas.alimentos
ClientDetailPage.jsx: All 8 tabs have data-testid attributes for testing
ClientDetailPage.jsx: Macros modal validates note field before save (frontend validation)
ClientDetailPage.jsx: Active tab uses data-[state=active]:bg-[#FF671F] for orange styling
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration19_client_detail_tabs.py - Created comprehensive test suite for client detail 8 tabs
seed_data_creation: Used existing clientedemo (094426a3-fcb2-4411-969f-2896f6c69518) with: macros (auto, 190/170/60 train, 45/50 peri, 225/170/60 rest), routine (5 days training), 6 diets, 1 payment, 0 reports. Created 4 macro_history entries during testing (restored to original values).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified ClientDetailPage 8 tabs. Backend endpoints: GET /api/admin/clients/{id} (returns profile, user, routines, reports, payments, messages, macro_history, nutrition_stats), PUT /api/admin/clients/{id}/macros (updates macros and creates history). Frontend data-testids: client-detail, tab-resumen, tab-macros, tab-membresia, tab-reportes, tab-cuestionario, tab-entrenamiento, tab-nutricion, tab-seguimiento, change-macros-btn, macros-modal, macro-input-tp, macro-note, save-macros-btn, generate-routine-btn, routine-instructions. clientedemo has 6 diets, 0 reports, 1 payment, 1 active routine with 7 days (5 training + 2 rest).
